name: Hadron

phase_0.boundary_condition: The color singlet confinement scale that encloses the hadron and prevents the isolation of fractional color charges.

VINIT.justification: The bare perturbative state before any virtual parton fluctuations or interactions are initialized.

TANCH.justification: The closed confinement scale that contains the entire hadronic system and enforces overall color neutrality.

AFWD.justification: The directed renormalization group flow toward higher energy scales and shorter distance resolutions.

AREV.justification: The reverse flow toward lower energy scales and longer distances where the strong coupling constant diverges.

CLINK.justification: The sequential composition of parton splitting kernels that chain together to form the parton shower.

IMSCRIB.justification: The self identifying color singlet bound state that recognizes itself as a complete physical particle.

FSPLIT.justification: A high energy parton splits into a lower energy daughter parton and a radiated gluon.

FFUSE.justification: The daughter parton and the radiated gluon fuse back together to recover the original high energy parton.

EVALT.justification: The affirmative state where the coupling is weak and asymptotic freedom permits exact calculation.

EVALF.justification: The negative state where the coupling is strong and nonperturbative hadronization prevents isolated parton observation.

ENGAGR.justification: The Bloom Gilman duality paradice where the averaged partonic cross section and the resonant hadronic cross section are held simultaneously as equivalent descriptions.

IFIX.justification: The permanent irreversible measurement that records the parton distribution functions as fixed empirical data.

phase_3.void_description: The bare perturbative vacuum devoid of virtual parton fluctuations and strong force interactions.
phase_3.true_description: The weak coupling ultraviolet regime where asymptotic freedom permits perturbative calculation of scattering amplitudes.
phase_3.false_description: The strong coupling infrared regime where color confinement prevents the observation of isolated fractional color charges.
phase_3.both_description: Bloom Gilman duality where the averaged partonic cross section exactly mirrors the resonant hadronic cross section without resolving the contradiction.

steps.domain_action: Initialize the bare parton state in the asymptotic vacuum before any interactions occur.
Evolve the state forward along the renormalization group flow to the hard ultraviolet scattering scale.
Branch the high energy parent parton into a lower energy daughter parton on the true arm and a radiated gluon on the false arm.
Affirm the perturbative validity of the daughter parton as it remains in the weak coupling regime.
Compose the next sequential DGLAP splitting kernel to continue the parton shower evolution.
Negate the perturbative validity of the radiated gluon as it softens and enters the strong coupling domain.
Reverse the momentum scale of the gluon descending into the nonperturbative infrared confinement regime.
Recombine the lower energy daughter parton and the radiated gluon to recover the original high energy parent parton.
Enter the paradice of quark hadron duality holding both the partonic and hadronic descriptions simultaneously.
Recognize the self identifying color singlet hadron eigenstate as a complete physical entity.
Record the deep inelastic scattering cross section as a permanent parton distribution function measurement.
Seal the color singlet confinement boundary completing the closed hadronic system.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: Lattice QCD path integral formulation translating continuous gauge fields into discrete computational operations.
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Color flux tubes mediating strong force interactions between quarks and gluons via Wilson lines.
phase_5.memory_mechanism: Parton distribution functions storing the momentum fraction histories of constituent partons.
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: Renormalization group equations dictating the strict scale evolution order of the parton shower.
phase_5.alfs_store: The QCD Lagrangian and the empirical proton mass spectrum serving as the canonical reference store.

phase_6.cycle_cost: Virtual gluon emission and vacuum polarization energy consumed during the parton shower evolution.
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: Bare parton state at the ultraviolet cutoff scale before branching.
phase_6.post_cycle_state: Dressed color singlet hadron state at the infrared confinement scale after recombination.
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0: The renormalization group flow preserves total color charge and probability maintaining unitarity across the parton shower.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → AFWD → FSPLIT → EVALT → CLINK → EVALF → AREV → FFUSE → ENGAGR → IMSCRIB → IFIX → TANCH
-- Class: Hadron
-- Fingerprint: sig=(6,2,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=12
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(2, 7)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑾  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑼 → 𐑚  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [2] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [3] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [4] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [5] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [6] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [7] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑳  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [8] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑙 → 𐑠  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [9] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑳 → 𐑭  | identity — self-imscription
--   [10] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑠 → 𐑡  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [11] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑭 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def hadron_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (Initialize the bare parton state in the asymptotic vacuum before any interact...)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑼 𐑚)  -- [1] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Evolve the state forward along the renormalization group flow to the hard ult...)
  -- FSPLIT [2] (gran := 𐑚) (Branch the high energy parent parton into a lower energy daughter parton on the true arm and a radiated gluon on the false arm.) / FFUSE [7] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [3] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (Affirm the perturbative validity of the daughter parton as it remains in the ...)
        (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [4] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Compose the next sequential DGLAP splitting kernel to continue the parton sho...)
      -- F-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (Negate the perturbative validity of the radiated gluon as it softens and ente...)
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (Reverse the momentum scale of the gluon descending into the nonperturbative i...))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [7]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑳)  -- [7] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (Recombine the lower energy daughter parton and the radiated gluon to recover the original high energy parent parton.)
  (.arrow 𐑳 𐑙 𐑠)  -- [8] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (Enter the paradice of quark hadron duality holding both the partonic and hadr...)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑳 𐑭)  -- [9] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (Recognize the self identifying color singlet hadron eigenstate as a complete ...)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑠 𐑡)  -- [10] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (Record the deep inelastic scattering cross section as a permanent parton dist...)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [11] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (Seal the color singlet confinement boundary completing the closed hadronic sy...)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def hadron_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (hadron_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def hadron_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (hadron_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem hadron_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
